apps.title: Diving Bell ATLANTIS — 1924
apps.description: A 1920s steel diving bell descending into the abyss. Two brass-rimmed portholes look out as the sea darkens from sunlit cyan to pitch black. Drag the winch lever to descend through kelp, schools, leviathan silhouettes and bioluminescent dark.

apps.title: The Fireplace · A Long Quiet Burn
apps.description: A simple wood fireplace burning in a dark room. Procedural fbm fire shader (3 layers, blue base + orange middle + yellow tips), ember particles rising, crackle audio with random pops, warm flicker on stone walls, optional snow window. Tab and forget.

apps.title: Medieval Blacksmith Workshop
apps.description: Cinematic single-room forge: shape a glowing blade across 12 hammer strikes, then quench it. Inline GLSL fire, sparks, water ripples; gesture-gated Web Audio (forge crackle, hammer ring, owl, completion chime).

apps.title: The Old Piano · It Plays Itself Now
apps.description: A single grand piano in an empty hall, plays itself slowly through a curated melodic phrase library at 56 BPM. Karplus-Strong-style synthesis (5-partial harmonics + hammer noise burst) with convolution reverb. Dust motes drift through window light. 88-key procedural piano with depress animation per note. Sit in the back row.

apps.title: The Porch · Watching The Storm Roll In
apps.description: A covered wooden porch as a summer thunderstorm rolls in. 1500 rain particles, lightning every 12-30s with stereo-panned thunder delayed by distance/343m·s, swing creak audio, distant hills with procedural lightning bolts. Just sit and watch.

apps.title: Polar Aurora Cabin
apps.description: Arctic cabin under the aurora — cast-iron stove glow, frosted window you can wipe clear, kettle on the boil, shimmering green-pink ribbons over a snowy night.

apps.title: The Rooftop · 3 AM
apps.description: Brooklyn rooftop at 3:14 AM. Procedural city skyline (3 parallax layers, 180+ buildings with random lit windows + flicker). Distant car horns (sawtooth FM with stereo pan), procedural saxophone phrases in D minor blues, occasional bird flock with chirps. Subway rumble every 2-4 minutes. Bistro string lights overhead.

apps.title: Flipper Palace · 1:47 AM
apps.description: A 1980s arcade after closing — empty aisles, one lit cabinet running attract mode, neon hum, jukebox synth-pop, and the slow melancholy of last call.

apps.title: The Window · Just Watch The Rain
apps.description: A single window with rain streaking down the glass. Soft daylight beyond. Distant trees, blurred buildings with warm window-dots. Occasional house finch lands on the sill (chirps + visual). That's the whole app — built around a single fragment shader that renders the entire experience to a fullscreen orthographic quad.

apps.title: The Childhood Bedroom · Lights Out
apps.description: A kid's bedroom at 9:32 PM. Camera is lying on the bed, looking up. Glow-in-the-dark stars on ceiling (procedural shader, breathing-light pulse), 3 different sticker packs. Nightlight on dresser casts warm orange glow. Window with night sky + roof silhouettes outside. Posters on walls. Audio: distant TV from another room, faint heartbeat, occasional floor creaks.

apps.title: Glowworm Cave — Cathedral Chamber
apps.description: Sit inside an undiscovered cave −312m below sea level. 3000 bioluminescent glowworms breathe on a raymarched ceiling, a still pool mirrors them, a single firefly drifts through the dark, water drips with cathedral reverb — and if you don't move for 90s, the constellations rearrange to spell a wish.

apps.title: Glass Elevator · Twilight Tower
apps.description: Alone in a glass elevator descending the side of a 60-story tower at dusk. City sprawls below, warm window lights flicker on, brass interior trim, lo-fi bossa nova procedural loop. Cinematic Three.js + GLSL + Web Audio mood piece.

apps.title: Dawn Meditation · Sunrise Over Still Water
apps.description: A 9-minute sunrise over a Maine lake. Sky shader animates from deep night blue → orange band → horizon glow → sun cresting → bright morning amber. Water reflects the entire progression with shimmering ripples and sun streak. Built-in breath pacer: 4-second inhale, 6-second exhale, central circle scales smoothly. Birds wake up gradually as dawn progresses (volume scales with phase). Pad ambient on C major triad. Sit. Breathe.

apps.title: St. Agnes Basilica — Empty Cathedral
apps.description: Stand alone in a Gothic cathedral on a quiet afternoon — colored light beams through stained glass, dust motes drifting, distant Gregorian chant, 8-minute sun cycle to nightfall. Press E at the altar to light a candle.

apps.title: Museum After Hours
apps.description: A reverent, empty museum at 11:47 PM — a procedural T-Rex skeleton stands mid-roar under a single spotlight while marble floors hold their breath.

apps.title: The Lava Lamp · 1971
apps.description: Vintage lava lamp in a wood-paneled room, blobs slowly rising and falling. Metaball-like shader with 5 blobs each on different cycle periods (14-32s) plus static top + bottom wax pools. Faint Crosby-Stills-Nash style folk arpeggios filtered through walls. Slow camera breathing.

apps.title: Forest Floor · Olympic Peninsula · Oct · Light Rain
apps.description: Lying on the moss of a Pacific Northwest old-growth forest, looking up. Conifer trunks rise out of frame, ferns sway, mushrooms pepper the floor, an ant trail crosses your path, and rain falls through gaps in the canopy. Three.js + GLSL + Web Audio cinematic mood piece — child's-eye view of the forest cathedral.

apps.title: The Bookstore
apps.description: A rainy afternoon inside a used bookstore — 1500 procedurally bound books, a black cat, a turntable playing Satie. Click any spine to read its first page.

apps.title: The Fireflies · A Summer Meadow At Dusk
apps.description: Summer meadow at twilight. 400 fireflies on individual blink cycles (2.5-5.5s periods, sharp rise + slow decay + off phase). Lazy random-walk movement with bounds. Sky gradient zenith to horizon (deep blue → orange-pink). Distant rolling hills + farmhouse light. Crickets in tall grass with chirp bursts. Bullfrogs every 60+s, distant cattle every 5+ min. Sit and watch.

apps.title: Attic · 10:14 PM
apps.description: Sitting in the attic of an old house during a 10:14 PM summer thunderstorm. Lightning flashes through a porthole window, briefly illuminating dust-sheeted boxes, an open trunk of yellowed Polaroids, a mannequin head, a green dress nobody remembers wearing. Click any object to see a procedural memory. Three.js + GLSL + Web Audio mood piece on family-history-as-storage.

apps.title: Chess Study · Dusk
apps.description: An old-world study at dusk where a wooden chess set plays itself. Real legal moves with minimax AI, procedural Chopin-style piano, fireplace, bookshelves, brass lamp. Cinematic Three.js + GLSL + Web Audio mood piece.

apps.title: 黒岳温泉 · Kurotake Onsen
apps.description: Soaking in a Japanese outdoor hot spring at autumn dusk. Steam billows, maple leaves drift on mineral-green water, snow-capped mountains glow with sunset alpenglow, and a bamboo shishi-odoshi pongs every 8-12 seconds. Three.js + GLSL + Web Audio mood piece on deep restoration.

apps.title: The Alpine Summit · Above The Clouds
apps.description: Sit at a mountain summit at dawn (3,847m, -8°C). Sea of clouds stretches below to horizon (5-octave fbm scrolling). Distant peaks emerge through 3 parallax layers. Sky gradient peach→deep blue. Foreground summit rocks with snow patches. Faint thin-air wind, Cmaj9 ambient pad with slow LFOs (5 voices), distant eagle cry every 60-180s.

apps.title: Stargazing Cliff · 1:14 AM · Perseid Peak
apps.description: Sit on a cliff above a black ocean during the Perseid meteor shower at 1:14 AM. Procedural Milky Way arc, thousands of stars, frequent meteor streaks (with rare slow fireballs and audio swoosh), distant ocean wavelets, blanket and thermos with steam, cliff wind, faint coyote howls, subtle heartbeat. Cosmic awe + small intimate companionship with the universe.

apps.title: Misty Canoe · Algonquin Park · Dawn
apps.description: A wooden canoe alone on a glass-still Algonquin lake at dawn. Mist coils off the water, distant pines emerge from fog, a loon calls. Press SPACE for a single deliberate paddle stroke — water swirls, the canoe glides 4m forward. Three.js + GLSL water/mist/treeline shaders + Web Audio loon, splash, drip, gunwale lap.

apps.title: The Typewriter · A Sentence At A Time
apps.description: Vintage Olivetti Lettera 32 (1963) on a wooden desk. Type any letter to advance through a procedurally generated short story (10 subjects × 11 verbs × 12 objects × 9 adverbs). Each keystroke clacks (filtered noise + low thud). Bell rings 5 chars before line end. Carriage return whirrs at line break.

apps.title: Hammock at Sunset · Anguilla
apps.description: Lying in a hammock between two coconut palms on a tropical beach at 6:47 PM. Sky burns orange-pink-purple, turquoise ocean breathes, distant island silhouettes, seabirds glide. Faint steel-drum calypso drifts in from a beach bar. Hammock sway oscillates the camera. Three.js + GLSL + Web Audio.

apps.title: Snow Globe Village
apps.description: Step inside a 1953 music-box snow globe — tiny gabled houses, warm window-lights, a church spire, and snow that swirls when you shake the glass.

apps.title: M/V Severomorsk · Bridge in Force 10
apps.description: Bridge of a Panamax container ship in a North Atlantic Force 10 storm. Gerstner waves with foam, wraparound windows with spray, CRT radar sweep, chart plotter, telemetry, pitch+roll dynamics, sliding coffee cup. Three.js + GLSL + Web Audio. Mood: dread.

apps.title: Rain On A Tin Roof · Just Listening
apps.description: Lying on a cot in a one-room tin-roofed cabin during a heavy rainstorm. Camera looks UP at the rusty corrugated ceiling. Procedural tin-roof shader with corrugated ribs + fbm rust patches + rare dark holes. 3-layer Web Audio rain bed (high hiss + mid bandpass tin-thump + deep rumble with LFO). Big drops 'PLINK' on tin every 0.3-1.8s with random pitch + pan. Distant thunder every 25-60s with delayed thunder timing.

apps.title: Fish Market Dawn
apps.description: Tokyo Tsukiji-style fish market at 5:14 AM — fluorescent-lit stalls of crushed ice and fish, vendor calls echoing under tin roof, pre-dawn steam.

apps.title: Mr. Tofas' Clocks · 18:54
